title: Contact | Robbie Moore MP
meta_description: Latest news and campaigns from Robbie Moore, MP for Keighley and Ilkley.

text_excerpt: Contact | Robbie Moore MP Skip to main content Robbie Moore MP Main navigation Home Campaigns Keighley & Ilkley News 🏥 New Airedale Hospital SECURED Contact 🔍 Search Digital ID - Have your say Stop The Scouts Tax - Sign the Open Letter ✍️ Worth Valley By-Election - What you need to know 🚜 Stop the Family Farm Tax 🚨 Stop the Grooming Gangs Robbie Moore MP Contact Leave this field blank Office of Robbie Moore MP Shan House, 80-86 North St, Keighley, BD21 3AG 01535 600538 [email protected] When writing to me by letter or email please always include your full name and home address including postcode. Please be aware I receive a large volume of correspondence, but will endeavour to respond as quickly as possible.
